name: EdwLoadMbrRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MEMBERSHIP' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY:    IdsMbrshpBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job Updates the P_RUN_CYC table with the ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN and CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN set to 'Y' after balancing is done for the subject area

Annotations:
Job Name: EdwLoadMbrRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Membership with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Copy for Buffer
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'

Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Membership Load Indicator Update
